title: BreadBoard Operation Envelope v1
description: Ingress operation envelope used to request work across CLI/API/TUI and related client surfaces.

op_id.description: Stable operation identifier used for correlation across events and logs.

op_type.description: Operation type/category requested by the client.

thread_id.description: Thread identifier for ordered operation/event sequencing.

session_id.description: Session identifier containing the operation context.

requested_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the operation was requested.
